# sixtom

> Pair Sprints by Sam D'Angelo. Your prototype works. Production is its own job. A week with me and one of your team's domain experts — they drive, I shape, the thing ships. $7,500 fixed. 1 client a month.

## What it is

- 1 week.
- You bring a domain expert. They drive, I shape.
- We ship the thing — clean code, real users, no committees.
- You keep the code and the muscle.

## Who it's for

- You have a working prototype that won't ship.
- An internal tool that won't scale past the person who built it.
- A domain expert who can build with AI but stalls on production.

## How it goes

- Day 0: 30-min intro call. We figure out the thing.
- Day 1: I show up. You introduce me to who I'm pairing with.
- Days 1–5: They drive. I shape. The thing ships.
- Day 5: Working version in production. You own it.
- Day 30: Check-in. What stuck, what didn't.

## Pricing

- $7,500 USD, fixed.
- 1 client a month, by appointment.
- If we're not on track by day 3, we stop. You keep what we built and pay only for the time.

## How to engage

- Book a 30-min intro call (link on the homepage).
- Notify list for the next open slot (form on the homepage).
